title: Smukk's Added Megas
description: A datapack that adds new custom megas to Cobblemon :D
body:
# Smukk's Added Megas V1,1
**Smukk's Added Megas** is a datapack that brings brand new megas to your Cobblemon!

Version 1.0 includes **8 new mega evolutions**, with more planned for the future

**Remember to add the datapack to both the datapack folder and the ressource pack folder and enable it**

Requires **[Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)** and **[Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown)** to function correctly

Optionally use **[All The Mons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons)** for access to Mega versions of regional Arcanine and Sandslash

Mega Stone **Smithing Recipes**

All Mega Stones are crafted in the **Smithing Table**:

**Arcanite**
Dragon Fang + Raw Mega Stone + Fire Gem

**Boltundite**
Electric Gem + Raw Mega Stone + Gold Ingot

**Cryogite**
Ice Gem + Raw Mega Stone + Ice Gem

**Electrodite**
Upgrade + Raw Mega Stone + Electirizer

**Golduckite X**
Mystic Water + Raw Mega Stone + Psychic Gem

**Golduckite Y**
Mystic Water + Raw Mega Stone + Water Gem

**Kricketunite**
Ghost Gem + Raw Mega Stone + Silver Powder

**Sandslashite**
Ground Gem + Raw Mega Stone + Black Glasses

**Shedinjite**
Shed Shell + Raw Mega Stone + Reaper Cloth

For Contact, find me in the **Cobblemon** or **Mega Showdown** discords or send a discord DM to **smkkungr**

Massive thanks to Tolemor for helping with designs (notably the design of Shedinja) and listening to my BS
